max.description: Maximum number of tags allowed. Non-finite values disable the cap.

id.description: Stable id for the visible text input. Falls back to FormField context or a generated id.

value.description: Controlled tags. When provided, the parent owns the tag array.

defaultValue.description: Initial tags for uncontrolled usage. Ignored after mount.

delimiter.description: Key that commits the current input into a tag. Enter always commits separately.

allowDuplicates.description: Allow the same trimmed tag value to appear more than once.

disabled.description: Disable the input and chip removal affordances.

name.description: Hidden input name used for native form submission.

class.description: Additional class merged onto the root element.
